goal: Block no-regression harness patch promotion when collected harness-quality metrics regress, even if another metric such as cost improves.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: A candidate patch can promote on cost, latency, cache, or another positive metric while silently worsening malformed tool-call rate, JSON reliability, repair loops, FIM quality, permission pressure, human intervention, or rollback pressure.
